subcodes.title: Words to Florence Khan, spoken on 1906-06-13
subcodes.first_line: This is the exposition of one of the great questions of Divine Wisdom which Christ has couched in this brief and simple utterance. That great question is this:
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @effort; striving, @all things are in motion; kinds of motion
